What actually happened.

## Impact
- [ ] Blocks demo / interview flow
- [ ] Breaks retrieval quality

## Logs / Error Output
Paste the relevant traceback, HTTP response, or terminal logs here.

Paste logs here

## Query / Input Used

## Screenshots
If the issue is UI-related, attach screenshots or screen recordings.

## Additional Context
Anything else that might help diagnose the issue.
